findings.description: Command injection risk: execSync with string concatenation using user-provided file paths from files-to-commit.json
findings.resolution: FIXED in commit 7d387da: replaced execSync with spawnSync using array arguments

findings.description: Indentation inconsistency inside try/finally block for reviewer lifecycle
findings.resolution: ACCEPTED: minor formatting issue, no functional impact. To be fixed in next formatting pass.

findings.description: sdd.json references .pi/extensions/loom/ui/config-editor.ts which did not exist in initial commits
findings.resolution: FIXED in commit 7d387da: created placeholder config-editor.ts

findings.description: killSubagent only marks status as 'aborted' in memory; actual child process is not killed (no PID tracking)
findings.resolution: ACCEPTED: known limitation for v1. Full process kill requires spawner PID tracking (deferred to v2).

invariant_checks.note: TUI widgets remain read-only; no edit tools exposed to operator
Model config still loaded from subagent-config.json; no hardcoded models added
All UI text in Russian; system/code comments in English

follow_up_resolutions.description: Verification matrix не сгенерирован в artifacts/
follow_up_resolutions.resolution: FIXED: generated knowledge/project/artifacts/verification-matrix.json with 43 entries. Improved heuristic: defined → needs_audit (not failed) for completed tasks.

follow_up_resolutions.description: Localization guard не интегрирован в executor flow автоматически
follow_up_resolutions.resolution: FIXED: loom_spawn_worker now auto-runs localization guard after successful worker commit via runLocalizationGuard() helper. Guard result appended to worker output.
FIXED: removed placeholder. SDD updated: COMP-config-editor.files now points to agent-mode/tools.ts (loom_edit_config). TUI form deferred to v2.
FIXED: added schema validation via validateExecutionConfigShape / validateSubagentConfigShape before write. Returns isError on validation failure without saving.
ACCEPTED: current code already separates pure getNextPendingStep from side-effects in tool execute. No change required.

follow_up_resolutions.description: SDD: COMP-localization-guard указывает executor-loop.ts вместо tools.ts
Эвристика verification matrix: defined → failed для completed tasks
follow_up_resolutions.resolution: FIXED: changed to defined → needs_audit for completed tasks. Added needs_audit to VerificationMatrix summary and all UI outputs.
